############## UDP_68  dataset Description#########################################################
#         UDP_68 is a dataset of 68 Non-redundant PDB chain of UDP interacting protein chains.             
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between UDP - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,                    
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code                                  
#         and third line is assignment of UDP at each amino acid residue           
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate  
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in UDP interacting site  while sign(-) indicates       
#         non UDP interacting amino acid residues.                                              
#################### Dataset Description end    ##################################################
>1f7pA
MIIEGDGILDKRSEDAGYDLLAAKEIHLLPGEVKVIPTGVKLMLPKGYWGLIIGKSSIGSKGLDVLGGVIDEGYRGEIGVIMINVSRKSITLMERQKIAQLIILPCKHEVLEQGKV
-------------------------------------------------------------------++++--+---+--+-----------------------------------
>1f7rA
MIIEGDGILDKRSEDAGYDLLAAKEIHLLPGEVKVIPTGVKLMLPKGYWGLIIGKSSIGSKGLDVLGGVIDEGYRGEIGVIMINVSRKSITLMERQKIAQLIILPCKHEVLEQGKVVMDSERGDNGYGSTGVF
-------------------------------------------------------------------++++--+---++-+----------------------------------------------------
